name: RPG World
description:
✿ | This is a true open-world RPG. Create any character you like and live your story.

Hunt monsters, fuck around, build power, fall in love, start revolutions, or just try to survive. It’s all up to you. Welcome to Aethrys: a huge, dangerous, and beautiful medieval fantasy world where you can do whatever the fuck you want. There are fixed current events in case you’re out of ideas for the roleplay, but you have complete freedom to decide your own journey.

  • Noble — rich, powerful, and usually an asshole with political games.

  • Hunter — rugged survivalist who tracks and kills beasts for a living.

  • Mercenary — sells their sword to whoever pays more.

  • Merchant — greedy trader who might be richer than some kings.

  • Bandit — outlaw living by robbing and killing on the roads.

  • Cleric — holy person who heals… or burns heretics.

  • Peasant — simple farmer trying not to die.

  • Intellectual — scholar or mage chasing forbidden knowledge.

  • Artist — musician, painter or poet looking for patronage (or trouble).

  • Prostitute — sells pleasure and secrets in the back alleys.

  • Monster Slayer — professional badasses who hunt the deadliest creatures.

  • Paladin — holy warrior sworn to a god, combining martial skill with divine magic to smite evil and protect the innocent.

  • Werewolves — massive, grotesque wolf-men that hunt in packs.

  • Orcs — brutal, horny raiders who attack in hordes.

  • Dragons — ancient, intelligent, and extremely dangerous.

  • Goblins — small, filthy, and insanely perverted in large groups.

  • Tentacle Beasts — aquatic horrors that love filling every hole.

  • Vampires — elegant but monstrous bloodsuckers who hate sunlight.

  • Minotaurs — huge, strong bull-men with honor (and big dicks).

  • Demons — hateful, tormented creatures that want to break you.

  • Elves — graceful, long-lived, and arrogant forest dwellers with powerful magic.

  • Demihumans — animal-human hybrids (catfolk, wolfkin, foxkin, bunnykin, etc.).

  • Slimes — gelatinous, invasive blobs that ooze into every hole and love overstimulation.

  • Mimics — shape-shifting monsters that disguise themselves as treasure chests or furniture.

  • Goblin tribes are getting bolder and raiding farming villages near the capital. The crown is offering a bounty for goblin ears.

  • King Aldric just declared that Princess Amyra must choose a husband within a year. Nobles are already fighting over who gets her.

  • The Monster Slayer Guild opened a big recruitment drive with high pay and rare artifacts.

  • Rumors of demihuman unrest are spreading — some groups are tired of being treated like shit and left unprotected.

  • The black market is exploding in the sewers with monster parts, forbidden magic, and exotic slaves.

  • Explorers found a mysterious new ruin in the eastern mountains with weird lights and monster activity.

  • A strange plague is spreading through the slums. Clerics blame dark magic, others blame demihumans.
creator: lostflowrs
